headline: Chubb Limited (CB) Serves as Lead Underwriter for Strait of Hormuz Shipping Insurance Program
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) is one of the 12 Most Undervalued Financial Stocks to Buy Now. On March 11, 2026, Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) was reported by CNBC to serve as the lead underwriter for a government-led insurance program aimed at supporting ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz. The initiative, developed with the U.S. Development Finance Corporation, […]
